text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On my day off, I spot Curren Chan at a cafe.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I ordered the new flavor! Hopefully I'll do a good
job reviewing it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's looking at her phone on the table and
talking to herself...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that's it for part A. The next thing I need to
film is...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Bro? Fancy seeing you here!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Sis? Fancy seeing you here!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, the video just now? I'm uploading it to
UmaTube!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
UmaTube is a video-sharing service that's popular
with people of all ages. I had no idea Curren
Chan was on UmaTube as well.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ha! Do you hear yourself? I'm doing both, of
course!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I actually made my UmaTube channel a long time
ago. I just hadn't really been giving it much
attention.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: But now I'm gonna be posting a bunch!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If I wanna be the most beloved runner, I have to
get more people to know who I am.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Since there are so many people watching
UmaTube, I figure posting there is pretty
important. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Sooo... don't forget to subscribe to Curren
Channel ♪!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Sooo... don't forget to subscribe to Curren
Channel ♪!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll walk you through it. First, you have to make an
account...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for subscribing. ♪ Now that my
UmaTube's all set...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Make sure to follow me on UmaTok and Umatter
too!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Of course! I'm gonna be posting on those next! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I really recommend this cafe's special latte! I'll
show you how to order it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though I came to this cafe to get a drink, I
end up helping with Curren Chan's posting on
social media.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Time for a funny-face contest! Ready, go! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Teehee! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Grrr...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Okay. Show me the vid.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Okay. Show me the vid.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: All right! ♪ I think this one's okay for UmaTok!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh. Your arms are shaking... I guess you were holding my phone for a long time.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh. Your arms are shaking... I guess you were holding my phone for a long time.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for doing like 107 retakes. But thanks to
you, I got a good one!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've filmed the dance too, it's time to
post on Umatter!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I usually just use Umatter as a way to get people
to check out my UmaTube and Umastagram.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But since the audiences are different, there are
some pics I only upload there. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm... Oh, this lighting's perfect! Quick—get a pic!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm... Oh, this lighting's perfect! Quick—get a pic!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Flash! Flash! Flash!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thanks. Now to add a caption... Aaand post!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I check out her post right away. It's a picture of
her smiling indifferently in front of the setting sun
with the caption, "Let's go on another date soon."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's just a regular picture of Curren Chan, but the
speed at which it gets attention is amazing.
choice_data_list: The number of likes... It's over 10,000!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow! That might be a new record! Having
someone else take the shot really does
wonders. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It seems like maybe Umatter users like having a
story attached to the upload!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If you just post a pic with a short sentence, you
get more attention than if you try too hard for it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't really get it myself, but it looks like she
uses each platform differently. But...
choice_data_list:
Don't you think you're uploading a little too
much?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After spending just one day with her, I've realized
that posting on social media is much more
difficult than I'd imagined. I'd prefer if she
concentrated that energy solely on her races.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...You think?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'm completely fine, though.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'm completely fine, though.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Posting on social media is my calling, and getting
to interact with everyone really refreshes me.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So don't worry about me. Just look forward to the
Aoi Stakes, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So don't worry about me. Just look forward to the
Aoi Stakes, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can feel an intense pressure behind her bright
smile... I don't think she'll let me say anything
else.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I've gotta post to Umastagram soon. Stay
with me till I'm done, 'kay? Thanks! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I've gotta post to Umastagram soon. Stay
with me till I'm done, 'kay? Thanks! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It ends up being a day spent taking tons of
pictures... My worries, unfortunately, are never
addressed.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"#CuteCurrenChan #AoiStakes #RightBefore
#JapaneseDerby #CheerForMe ♪"
